animation-5.--5h-0ba-box-shadow-shared: var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-thickness-1-shared) 0 0 var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-color-1-shared) inset, 0 var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-thickness-2-shared) 0 var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-color-2-shared) inset, calc(-1 * var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-thickness-3-shared)) 0 0 var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-color-3-shared) inset, 0 calc(-1 * var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-thickness-4-shared)) 0 var(--5h-0ba-box-shadow-color-4-shared) inset

animation-0.--0hb-background-image: radial-gradient( ellipse at center, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 80% )
